features.name: simulation without top module
features.description: Code should include SV design loaded via read_verilog -sv that results in no top module when sim command is invoked

features.name: hierarchy auto-top command
features.description: Code should include hierarchy -auto-top command used to automatically set top module before simulation

extraction_summary.notes: No SV test file content available - issue references sim_segfault.zip attachment. Bug trigger is running sim on design with no top module set.
